B14Gretest.notes: B14G-retest COMPLETE 2026-03-12. FIX-1 (scheduleFlush flushQueueRef stale closure) PASS — 3 offline IDB ANSWER_CHANGE items flushed within 1s of network restore, no TDZ/ReferenceError errors. FIX-2 (reconcileQueue content-based comparison) FAIL — content-based comparison code IS present in source (useTestSession.js lines 662-681) but reconcileQueue never executes it. Root cause: DB race condition — dbRef.current is null when getPendingItems fires (session loads before IDB initDB async completes), causing getPendingItems to return [] immediately, reconciledRef.current set true, function blocked from all future runs. Fix: add dbReady state to useOfflineQueue (set after dbRef.current assigned), return from hook, add to reconcileQueue dep array and guard condition. FIX-10 (heartbeat online event listener) DOCUMENTED — Connection unstable banner confirmed at ~46.5s offline (3 failures × 15s), Reconnected banner at ~2s after restore (visibilitychange handler provides partial mitigation; online event listener still missing from useHeartbeat.js). See findings_B14G.md.
openFindings: B14G-RETEST-001 (High — reconcileQueue DB race condition: dbRef.current is null at reconcile time, getPendingItems returns [], reconciledRef.current set true prematurely, offline answers permanently lost on resume; fix: add dbReady state to useOfflineQueue, guard reconcileQueue effect on dbReady)

B14G-RETEST-002 (Medium — FIX-10 not applied: useHeartbeat.js missing window.addEventListener('online', ...) listener; current visibilitychange provides partial mitigation but real-browser no-focus-change scenarios wait up to 15s for recovery)

fixesApplied: ReviewScreen.jsx FIX-7 (timer on review screen) completed 2026-03-12
